scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p aether-web --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir src/wasm ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aether_web.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz src/wasm/aether_web_bg.wasm -o src/wasm/aether_web_bg.wasm
